series_metadata.series_description: Files created in the investigation of a felony case.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for six years after the offense is committed, when the case has exhausted all legal remedies, until no longer determined to be of evidentiary value, or otherwise required by law, whichever is longer, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for six years after the offense is committed, when the case has exhausted all legal remedies, until no longer determined to be of evidentiary value, or otherwise required by law, whichever is longer, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
